name: integration_incident_correlation
prompt: Multiple alerts are firing and pods are crashing. Can you correlate these events and tell me what happened?

recorded_responses.get_events:

14:03  Normal   ScalingReplicaSet  Deployment/api-server  Scaled up to 3
14:04  Warning  Unhealthy  Pod/api-server-new-abc  Readiness probe failed: connection refused
14:04  Warning  Unhealthy  Pod/api-server-new-def  Readiness probe failed: connection refused
14:05  Warning  BackOff    Pod/api-server-new-abc  Back-off restarting failed container
14:06  Warning  BackOff    Pod/api-server-new-def  Back-off restarting failed container
recorded_responses.correlate_incident: {"incident_id": "INC-2024-0115-001", "timeline": [{"time": "14:02", "event": "ConfigMap api-config updated", "type": "change"}, {"time": "14:03", "event": "Deployment rolling restart triggered", "type": "effect"}, {"time": "14:04", "event": "New pods fail readiness probes", "type": "symptom"}, {"time": "14:06", "event": "CrashLoopBackOff alerts fire", "type": "alert"}], "root_cause": "ConfigMap update introduced invalid configuration", "blast_radius": "api-server deployment (3 replicas)", "confidence": 0.92}
